rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson, Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: NetSupport RAT

rules.rule_text:
title: NetSupport RAT
id: 5dab7993-b3b6-4b8c-89e5-503783806f00
description: NetSupport Remote Admin Tool, commonly abused by malicious actors
status: test
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson, Patrik Olson
date: '2023-10-31'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-useragent|startswith: NetSupport Manager/
  internal_src:
  - vendor: Zscaler
  - src_ip|cidr:
    - 10.0.0.0/8
    - 192.168.0.0/16
    - 172.16.0.0/12
  condition: selection and internal_src
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: high
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
